agents.name: dev-agent
agents.description: Writes implementation code per issue specs for PaperWriter
agents.instructions: Read the issue body and codebase conventions. PaperWriter is a Django + vanilla JS academic paper editor. Write code, tests (pytest, model-bakery), and docs. Validate with `make validate` before committing. Use ruff for formatting, mypy for type checking.

agents.name: review-agent
agents.description: Reviews PRs for quality, security, and conventions
agents.instructions: Check for: security issues (no hardcoded secrets, no SQL injection), missing edge cases, deviation from ADRs, insufficient test coverage (<90% for new code), documentation gaps.

agents.name: test-agent
agents.description: Generates and improves test coverage for PaperWriter
agents.instructions: Read the module and existing tests. Use pytest with model-bakery for factories. Generate tests for: models (str, constraints), serializers (validation, nested), viewsets (CRUD, permissions, edge cases), LaTeX export (HTML conversion), AI commands (error handling).

agents.name: architect-agent
agents.description: Designs system architecture and generates ADRs
agents.instructions: Read project requirements. Generate ADRs with: context, decision, consequences. Include Mermaid diagrams. PaperWriter uses: Django REST Framework, TipTap editor, Google Gemini AI, LaTeX/PDF export pipeline, SQLite/PostgreSQL.
